_comment: CleanOS Lite Ruleset — update this file to push new telemetry coverage to all installations.
_comment2: Bump 'version' on every change. Sentry compares this against its cached copy on each login.

registry.name: AllowTelemetry
registry.note: Lock telemetry level — Home/Pro silently raises this to 1, backed up by the two keys below

registry.name: Start
registry.note: Kill DiagTrack autologger at boot

registry.name: LimitDiagnosticLogCollection
registry.note: Home/Pro fallback — cuts off pipeline regardless of edition

registry.name: DisableOneSettingsDownloads
registry.note: Prevent MS from pushing new data-collection configs post-update

registry.name: DoNotShowFeedbackNotifications
registry.note: Suppress feedback popups that harvest usage timing

registry.name: DisableDiagnosticDataViewer
registry.note: Block access to the telemetry data viewer

registry.name: DisableRecall
registry.note: Disable AI Recall screenshot feature

registry.name: DisableAIDataAnalysis
registry.note: Disable AI data analysis pipeline

registry.name: TurnOffWindowsCopilot
registry.note: Belt-and-suspenders Copilot block alongside app removal

registry.name: AllowCortana
registry.note: Block Cortana — separate backend from Copilot, still present on some builds

registry.name: EnableActivityFeed
registry.note: Stop Windows logging what the user opens

registry.name: PublishUserActivities
registry.note: Stop user activity being published to MS account

registry.name: UploadUserActivities
registry.note: Stop activity history being uploaded to the cloud

registry.name: DODownloadMode
registry.note: Disable P2P update sharing via user bandwidth

registry.name: Disabled
registry.note: Stop crash dumps being sent to Microsoft

registry.name: DisableWindowsConsumerFeatures
registry.note: Stop MS silently installing suggested apps

registry.name: DisableCloudOptimizedContent
registry.note: Block cloud-pushed Spotlight ads and tips

registry.name: NoActiveProbe
registry.note: Disable NCSI phone-home probe to msftconnecttest.com

registry.name: RotatingLockScreenEnabled
registry.note: Disable Spotlight rotating lock screen images

registry.name: SubscribedContent-338388Enabled
registry.note: Disable Windows tips and suggestions

registry.name: HiberbootEnabled
registry.note: Disable Fast Startup / Hibernate boot — ensures full shutdown applies registry changes cleanly

registry.name: DisableHTTPPrinting
registry.note: Disable print spooler HTTP telemetry

registry.name: DisableWebPnPDownload
registry.note: Disable web-based printer driver downloads

registry.name: TailoredExperiencesWithDiagnosticDataEnabled
registry.note: Disable tailored experiences based on diagnostic data

registry.name: Enabled
registry.note: Disable Advertising ID

registry.name: BingSearchEnabled
registry.note: Disable Bing in Start Menu search

registry.name: IsDynamicSearchBoxEnabled
registry.note: Disable taskbar search Fun Facts and highlights

registry.name: MetricsReportingEnabled
registry.note: Disable Edge usage stats reporting

registry.name: PersonalizationReportingEnabled
registry.note: Disable Edge personalisation data collection

registry.name: UserFeedbackAllowed
registry.note: Disable Edge feedback submission

registry.name: StartupBoostEnabled
registry.note: Disable Edge startup boost (background process at boot)

registry.name: BackgroundModeEnabled
registry.note: Disable Edge running in the background after close

registry.name: NoAutoUpdate
registry.note: Keep auto-update ON for security patches

registry.name: AUOptions
registry.note: Notify before download — user controls when feature updates install

registry.name: DeferFeatureUpdates
registry.note: Defer feature updates by 30 days — security updates still install immediately

registry.name: DeferFeatureUpdatesPeriodInDays
registry.note: 30-day deferral window for feature updates
